title: hymenophyllum bartlettii
intro: Hymenophyllum bartlettii, also known as Bartlett's filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is a small, delicate fern with lacy fronds that grows in shaded, humid environments. The medicinal properties of Hymenophyllum bartlettii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal medicine.
